meta.title: ATHAR — AI that answers every call and message, 24/7
meta.description: B2B AI automation for SMEs across Egypt and the Arab world. Every call answered, every WhatsApp replied, every lead captured — in Arabic and English, around the clock. Deployed in days.

hero.headline_1: Every call answered. Every message replied.
hero.headline_2: While you sleep. In Arabic and English.
hero.subline: ATHAR is a B2B AI automation system for SMEs across Egypt and the Arab world. It picks up the calls your team can't, replies on WhatsApp in seconds, qualifies the lead, and books the next step — 24/7, at a fraction of the cost of a sales or support hire.
hero.cta_secondary: Call or WhatsApp now — hear it answer in seconds ←
hero.badge: Every unanswered call or ignored WhatsApp is a customer choosing a competitor. ATHAR closes that gap — deployed in days, not months.

problem.headline: Your customers reach out. Nobody is on the other side.
problem.subline: Every SME without 24/7 coverage loses the same customers in the same three ways — whether you sell apartments, courses, cars, legal hours, or service contracts.

pains.title: The missed call at 10:47 PM
pains.body: A ready-to-buy lead calls after hours and hits voicemail. By morning they've called a competitor who answered. Most SMEs lose 30–50% of inbound leads to slow first response — and never know which ones.

pains.title: The WhatsApp left on read
pains.body: Your team is on calls, in meetings, or off the clock. The message sits unanswered for hours. The customer's intent cools, and the deal goes to whoever replied first — not whoever was best.

pains.title: The follow-up that never happens
pains.body: Quotes get sent. Demos get booked. Then nobody chases. Inconsistent follow-up is where pipeline quietly dies — and where hiring more people barely moves the number.

problem.transition: Three leaks, one cause: response capacity tied to human hours. ATHAR replaces that ceiling with a system that runs while you don't.

solution.headline: An AI communication layer that answers, qualifies, and books — in your voice.
solution.subline: Not a generic chatbot. A system trained on your business, your offers, and your Arabic — fluent on calls and WhatsApp, working in the background of how you already operate.

pillars.title: Picks up every call and message — in Arabic and English
pillars.body: Voice and WhatsApp, 24/7. The AI greets the customer, understands intent in natural dialect, answers the common questions, and escalates only what truly needs a human.

pillars.title: Qualifies the lead and books the next step
pillars.body: Budget, timing, location, fit — captured inside the same conversation. The qualified lead lands in your CRM with an appointment, a quote request, or a hand-off, ready for your team to close.

pillars.title: Follows up so you don't have to
pillars.body: Reminders, re-engagement, and structured follow-up sequences run automatically — turning the leads you used to lose into revenue, without adding a single headcount.

tiers.headline: Three tiers. One promise: no lead left unanswered.
tiers.subline: Start where the pain is loudest. Scale when you're ready. Every tier is fully done-for-you and deployed in days.

items.name: ATHAR CORE
items.tagline: AI call answering — never miss an inbound lead again
items.description: "Every call to my business is answered instantly — in Arabic or English — even at 2 AM."
features: AI voice agent answers every inbound call, 24/7
Natural conversation in Egyptian Arabic and English
Captures caller name, intent, and contact — straight to your inbox or CRM
Handles FAQs, hours, location, pricing, and booking
Escalates real buying signals to your team in real time
⏱ Live in days — not months
💰 A fraction of one full-time agent's salary, working 24/7

items.name: ATHAR FLOW
items.tagline: Call + WhatsApp automation — the full lead journey, automated
items.description: "Every inquiry — call or WhatsApp — gets answered, qualified, and followed up without my team lifting a finger."
features: Everything in CORE
24/7 WhatsApp automation alongside the voice agent
Lead qualification flows: budget, timing, location, intent
Automated booking, confirmations, and reminders
Re-engagement sequences for cold and stalled leads
Unified contact record across calls and chats
⏱ Deployed in 1–2 weeks

items.name: ATHAR ELITE
items.tagline: Full-stack AI communication — scale without scaling headcount
items.description: "Our whole front office — calls, chats, follow-ups, reporting — runs as one system, custom-built for how we sell."
features: Everything in FLOW
Custom workflows built around your sales process
Deep CRM, calendar, payment, and internal-tool integrations
Live analytics dashboard: response times, conversion, lost-lead reasons
Multi-channel: voice, WhatsApp, web chat, social DMs
Dedicated account manager + priority support
⏱ Tailored build, typically live within 3–4 weeks

process.headline: Three steps. From first call to live system.
process.subline: Each step ends with something concrete you keep — not "let's regroup next week."

steps.title: Lead-Loss Diagnosis (30–45 min, free)
steps.body: We map your current intake — calls, WhatsApp, forms, follow-up — and pinpoint exactly where leads are leaking and what each leak is costing you. You keep the map whether or not you work with us.

steps.title: Build & Train on Your Business (days, not months)
steps.body: We configure the voice agent and WhatsApp flows on your offers, your pricing, your tone — in Arabic and English. We integrate with the tools you already use and rehearse the system on real scenarios before any customer hears it.

steps.title: Go Live + Continuous Tuning
steps.body: From day one live, you see answer rate, response time, qualified leads, and booked next-steps in one dashboard. We tune flows weekly so the system gets sharper the longer it runs.

founder.headline: We watched serious SMEs lose serious money to a phone that rang twice and a WhatsApp left on read.
founder.body: The owners weren't lazy. The teams weren't bad. The ceiling was human hours — and hiring more people only moved the problem by a few hours a day. So we built ATHAR: an AI communication layer that speaks fluent Egyptian Arabic and English, answers every call and message, qualifies the lead, and hands your team only the conversations worth their time. The same leverage big companies build internally — now available to any SME ready to move.

proof.headline: What changes when no lead goes unanswered.
proof.subline: Patterns we see across SMEs in retail, real estate, education, legal, automotive, hospitality, and services.

stats.label: Calls and WhatsApp answered — in Arabic and English
From signup to a live AI agent on CORE
Replacing the cost and limits of multiple hires

testimonials.quote: We were missing roughly half our after-hours calls. A week after ATHAR went live, every call was answered and qualified — and our sales team finally stopped chasing dead leads.
testimonials.name: Mariam S.

testimonials.quote: We used to need two more agents just to keep up with WhatsApp. ATHAR handles the first response and the follow-up — we kept the team we had and doubled the pipeline we work.
testimonials.name: Ahmed E.

faq.headline: Straight answers.
faq.subline: If something isn't here, bring it to the free 30-min diagnosis.

items.q: Which industries is ATHAR built for?
items.a: Any SME in Egypt or the Arab world losing leads to slow response or inconsistent follow-up: retail, real estate, education, legal, automotive, hospitality, clinics, and professional services. If customers reach you by phone or WhatsApp, ATHAR fits.

items.q: Does the AI really sound natural in Arabic?
items.a: Yes. The voice and chat agents speak Egyptian Arabic and English fluently and switch between them mid-conversation when the customer does. You hear it for yourself before going live.
CORE: live in days. FLOW: 1–2 weeks. ELITE: typically 3–4 weeks depending on the integrations and custom workflows. No long implementation projects, no committee.

items.q: Do I need to change my phone number or tools?
items.a: No. You keep your existing number and WhatsApp. ATHAR sits behind them and works with the CRM, calendar, and tools you already use.

items.q: What about handing off to a human?
items.a: The AI handles routine inquiries and qualification. The moment a real buying signal appears — or a request the AI shouldn't handle — it routes the lead straight to the right person on your team, with full context.
Every tier includes ongoing support and tuning. ELITE includes a dedicated account manager who reviews performance with you and evolves the workflows as your business grows.

footer.tagline: ATHAR — AI that answers every call and message, 24/7.
footer.cta_subline: Free 30-minute diagnosis. We'll map exactly where leads are leaking and what it's costing you — no obligation.
